com.mentor.chs.plugin

Interface IXPrintServiceProvider

  • All Known Subinterfaces:
    IXApplicationContext, IXBaseContext, IXBaseSymbolContext, IXSubAssemblyWorkbookContext, IXSymbolContext, IXSystemContext

    @NotToBeImplemented
public interface IXPrintServiceProvider
    Service provider interface for providing print service

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      IXPrintServices getPrintServices()
      Retrieves object providing service to print diagrams to files in various formats.

      • getPrintServices

        Retrieves object providing service to print diagrams to files in various formats.
